description: Panygeric prasing the leaders (negidim) of the Jewish community. Mentioned are Elʿazar, Yefet, and ʿUziel and later also ʿOvadya. There is also a single line of poetry in Arabic script (about tears).
tags: literary with documentary value, Arabic poetry
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
